Class TrainingService

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
@Service public class TrainingService extends Object
Service class for training document and certification management.

Handles all training-related operations including document retrieval and upload, quiz management, acknowledgements, practical training sign-offs, and certification tracking.

Three completion types are supported:

  • TrainingCompletionType.READ_ACKNOWLEDGE – for policy documents requiring acknowledgement
  • TrainingCompletionType.QUIZ – for training materials with a quiz, awards a certification on full pass
  • TrainingCompletionType.PRACTICAL_SIGN_OFF – for hands-on training requiring manager approval

Role restrictions are enforced per method. Employees complete training; managers and admins upload documents, add questions, and approve practical training.

  • Constructor Details

    • TrainingService

      public TrainingService()

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentUser

      public User getCurrentUser()
      Returns the currently authenticated user from the Spring Security context.
      Returns:
      the authenticated User
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the user cannot be found in the database

    • getDocumentsByType

      public List<TrainingDocument> getDocumentsByType(TrainingDocumentType type)
      Returns all active training documents of the given type for the current user's organization.
      Parameters:
      type - the document type to filter by (POLICY or TRAINING)
      Returns:
      a list of matching active TrainingDocument objects

    • getDocumentById

      public TrainingDocument getDocumentById(Long id)
      Returns a training document by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the document ID
      Returns:
      the TrainingDocument
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if no document with the given ID exists

    • getMyCertifications

      public List<Certification> getMyCertifications()
      Returns all certifications earned by the currently authenticated employee. Returns an empty list for managers and admins.
      Returns:
      a list of Certification objects for the current user

    • getOrganizationCertifications

      public List<Certification> getOrganizationCertifications()
      Returns all certifications earned within the current user's organization. Only accessible to managers and admins.
      Returns:
      a list of Certification objects for the organization
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the current user is not a manager or admin

    • getMyAcknowledgements

      public List<DocumentAcknowledgement> getMyAcknowledgements()
      Returns all document acknowledgements made by the currently authenticated employee. Returns an empty list for managers and admins.
      Returns:
      a list of DocumentAcknowledgement objects for the current user

    • getTeamAcknowledgements

      public List<DocumentAcknowledgement> getTeamAcknowledgements()
      Returns all document acknowledgements across the current user's organization. Only accessible to managers and admins.
      Returns:
      a list of DocumentAcknowledgement objects for the organization
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the current user is not a manager or admin

    • getOrganizationEmployees

      public List<EmployeeOptionResponse> getOrganizationEmployees()
      Returns a list of employee users in the current user's organization. Used for populating the employee selector in practical training sign-off forms. Only accessible to managers and admins.
      Returns:
      a list of EmployeeOptionResponse objects
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the current user is not a manager or admin

    • createDocument

      public TrainingDocument createDocument(TrainingDocument document)
      Creates a new training document using metadata only (no file upload). Policies are automatically assigned the READ_ACKNOWLEDGE completion type. Training materials cannot use READ_ACKNOWLEDGE. Only accessible to managers and admins.
      Parameters:
      document - the document entity to save
      Returns:
      the saved TrainingDocument
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the current user is not a manager or admin
      IllegalArgumentException - if a training material is assigned READ_ACKNOWLEDGE

    • uploadDocument

      public TrainingDocument uploadDocument(org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, String title, String description, String content, TrainingDocumentType type, TrainingCompletionType completionType) throws Exception
      Uploads a training document as a file and saves it to the uploads/ directory. The file path and original filename are stored on the document entity. Only accessible to managers and admins.
      Parameters:
      file - the uploaded file
      title - the display title of the document
      description - a description of the document's content
      content - optional text content
      type - the document type (POLICY or TRAINING)
      completionType - how completion is tracked (QUIZ, ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, or PRACTICAL_SIGN_OFF)
      Returns:
      the saved TrainingDocument
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the current user is not a manager or admin
      IllegalArgumentException - if a training material is assigned READ_ACKNOWLEDGE
      Exception - if the file cannot be written to disk

    • getQuizQuestions

      public List<TrainingQuizQuestion> getQuizQuestions(Long documentId)
      Returns the quiz questions for a specific training document. Verifies that the document belongs to the current user's organization.
      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the training document
      Returns:
      a list of TrainingQuizQuestion objects
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the document is not found
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the document belongs to a different organization

    • addQuizQuestion

      public TrainingQuizQuestion addQuizQuestion(Long documentId, CreateQuizQuestionRequest request)
      Adds a new quiz question to a training document. Only accessible to managers and admins.
      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the document to add the question to
      request - the question data including text, options, and correct answer
      Returns:
      the saved TrainingQuizQuestion
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the current user is not a manager or admin
      RuntimeException - if the document is not found

    • submitQuiz

      public TrainingQuizResultResponse submitQuiz(Long documentId, QuizSubmissionRequest request)
      Submits quiz answers for a training document and evaluates the result.

      All questions must be answered correctly to pass. On a passing attempt, a Certification is awarded if the user does not already have one for this document.

      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the training document being assessed
      request - the submission containing the user's answers mapped by question ID
      Returns:
      a TrainingQuizResultResponse indicating score, pass/fail, and certification status
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the document is not found or has no quiz questions
      IllegalArgumentException - if the document is not quiz-based or no answers were submitted

    • acknowledgeDocument

      public void acknowledgeDocument(Long documentId)
      Records that the currently authenticated employee has acknowledged a policy document. Only employees can acknowledge documents. Prevents duplicate acknowledgements.
      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the policy document to acknowledge
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the current user is not an employee
      RuntimeException - if the document is not found
      IllegalArgumentException - if the document is not a policy or not acknowledge-based

    • approvePracticalTraining

      public void approvePracticalTraining(Long documentId, Long employeeId, String note)
      Records a practical training sign-off for an employee, approved by a manager.

      Verifies that both the document and the employee belong to the manager's organization. If the employee does not yet have a certification for this document, one is awarded automatically.

      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the training document the sign-off relates to
      employeeId - the ID of the employee being signed off
      note - an optional note from the approving manager
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.access.AccessDeniedException - if the current user is not a manager or admin, or if the employee belongs to a different organization
      RuntimeException - if the document or employee is not found
      IllegalArgumentException - if the document is not practical sign-off based

    • getMyTrainingStatuses

      public List<TrainingStatusResponse> getMyTrainingStatuses()
      Returns the training completion status for each active document in the organization, as seen by the currently authenticated employee.

      Status values:

      • NOT_STARTED – no activity recorded
      • ACKNOWLEDGED – policy has been acknowledged
      • PASSED / NOT_PASSED – quiz result
      • APPROVED / PENDING_MANAGER_APPROVAL – practical sign-off status
      Returns an empty list for managers and admins.
      Returns:
      a list of TrainingStatusResponse objects for the current employee
